title: GitHub - spiritform/comfy-matanyone2 · GitHub
text:
ComfyUI-MatAnyone2
ComfyUI custom nodes for
MatAnyone2
— a practical human video matting system that preserves fine details like hair, transparency, and motion blur while showing enhanced robustness under challenging real-world conditions.
Features
High-quality alpha mattes
— Avoids hard segmentation boundaries, captures hair strands, semi-transparent regions, and motion blur
Automatic person detection
— No mask input needed; auto-detects people in the first frame via DeepLabV3
Optional manual mask
— Connect SAM2, RMBG, or any segmentation node for precise control
Accepts VIDEO or IMAGE
— Pipe in directly from LTX, Wan, HunyuanVideo, or any image batch
Three outputs
— Alpha matte (MASK), white-on-black matte video (IMAGE), and foreground cutout (IMAGE)
Nodes
Load MatAnyone2 Model
Loads the MatAnyone2 checkpoint (~400MB, auto-downloads on first use to
ComfyUI/models/matanyone2/
).
MatAnyone2 Video Matting
Input
Type
Required
Description
model_pipe
MATANYONE2_MODEL
Yes
From Load MatAnyone2 Model
images
IMAGE
No*
Batch of video frames
video
VIDEO
No*
Direct video input (e.g. from LTX)
mask
MASK
No
First-frame segmentation mask. Auto-generated if not provided
warmup_frames
INT
Yes
Stabilization iterations on first frame (default: 10)
erode_kernel
INT
Yes
Mask erosion radius (default: 10)
dilate_kernel
INT
Yes
Mask dilation radius (default: 10)
max_size
INT
Yes
Downsample if min side exceeds this (-1 = no limit)
* Either
images
or
video
must be connected.
Output
Type
Description
alpha_mattes
MASK
Per-frame alpha for compositing
matte_video
IMAGE
White-on-black matte (for saving as video)
foreground
IMAGE
Person cutout on black background
Example Workflows
Minimal (auto-mask)
Text to Video (LTX/Wan/etc)
    └─ VIDEO → MatAnyone2 Video Matting → matte_video → Create Video → Save Video
                  └─ model_pipe ← Load MatAnyone2 Model
With manual mask (better edges)
Text to Video
    └─ VIDEO → Get Video Components
                  └─ images → Split Images (index 0)
                                  └─ RMBG / SAM2 → mask
                  └─ images ──────────────────────→ MatAnyone2 Video Matting
                                                        └─ model_pipe ← Load MatAnyone2 Model
Installation
Via ComfyUI Manager
Search for
matanyone2
and install.
Manual
cd
ComfyUI/custom_nodes
git clone https://github.com/spiritform/matanyone2.git ComfyUI-MatAnyone2
cd
ComfyUI-MatAnyone2
pip install -r requirements.txt
pip install --no-deps git+https://github.com/pq-yang/MatAnyone2.git
The model checkpoint auto-downloads on first use. To download manually, place
matanyone2.pth
from the
MatAnyone2 releases
into
ComfyUI/models/matanyone2/
.

by Peiqing Yang et al.
